{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Shifting Skies
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Shifting Skies]] is a blend of cloud, wind, and water madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Shifting Skies]] arm is a [[Highgold]] arm.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
